design_strategy: A high-energy, playful, and structured Neo-Brutalist design. We are mixing pastel backgrounds (mint, yellow, lavender) with harsh black borders (2px-3px) and solid offset drop shadows (4px 4px 0px #0A0A0A) to create a tactile, interactive feel perfect for an engaging EdTech platform targeting Indian students aged 12-18.

headings.strategy: Used for all major titles. High impact, bold, tight tracking. Do not use Inter.

body.strategy: Clean, highly legible geometric sans-serif for reading comprehension and UI elements.

primary.name: Cyber Yellow
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, highlighted text, major section backgrounds.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Containers use p-8 to p-12. Grids use wide gaps (gap-6 to gap-8). Elements should feel blocky and tactile.

hero.background: The provided MP4 video absolutely positioned, w-full h-full object-cover. Must use autoPlay, loop, muted, playsInline.
hero.typography: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-bold text-white tracking-tight text-center drop-shadow-md.
hero.cta: bg-[#FFD831] text-black border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] px-8 py-4 rounded-xl font-bold text-xl hover:translate-y-1 hover:translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all.

stats_section.layout: 3-column grid (bento style) overlapping the hero bottom edge or placed directly below it with negative margin.
stats_section.styling: Cards with pastel backgrounds (Mint, Lavender, Yellow), heavy borders, brutal_md shadow. Large text for numbers (text-4xl font-black), small text for labels.

class_grid.card_style: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] brutal_hover cursor-pointer group flex flex-col items-center text-center.
class_grid.colors: Apply a different pastel background color on hover or randomly assign pastel colors to cards.

state_boards.layout: Grid cols-2 md:cols-4 gap-6 relative p-8 bg-gray-50 border-y-2 border-black.
state_boards.card_style: bg-white border-2 border-dashed border-gray-400 rounded-xl p-6 text-gray-500 opacity-70 flex items-center justify-center font-bold.
state_boards.overlay_cta: Absolute centered 'Notify Me' floating card overlapping the grid. It should use a striking pastel color (e.g., Peach or Yellow) with brutal_lg shadow.

features_grid.layout: Bento grid (e.g. 2 large cards, 4 small cards) or 3x2 standard grid.
features_grid.card_style: Neo-brutalist cards with white or pastel backgrounds. Use large Lucide icons (strokeWidth={2.5}).

why_ceibaa.image_style: Image wrapped in a container with border-[3px] border-black and heavy shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#FFD831] to make it pop. Aspect ratio 4:3.

hero_background.description: Main background video for the hero section.

why_ceibaa_image.description: Students studying together, used in the Why Ceibaa section.

cta_background.description: Boy studying, used as an atmospheric background for the final CTA or features section.

icons.instructions: Use bold, thick strokes (strokeWidth={2.5} to 3) for icons to match the chunky neo-brutalist aesthetic.

animations.hover: Scale up slightly or translate -4px on X/Y to reveal larger shadow underneath. For buttons pressing down, translate +2px and reduce shadow.
animations.scroll: Use framer-motion for staggered entrances on grid items (e.g. initial={{opacity:0, y:20}} animate={{opacity:1, y:0}}).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building the '/chapter-tests' landing page.
Implement a Light theme with Neo-Brutalist elements (hard 2px-3px black borders, solid offset shadows, pastel colors like Mint, Lavender, Yellow).
Use 'Clash Display' (or a similar bold geometric sans) for headings and 'Outfit' for body text. Integrate them via Google Fonts.
Hero section MUST feature the provided video url as an absolute background. Apply a dark overlay (bg-black/50) so the bold white text overlays are highly readable.
Build the Class Selection Grid (Classes 6-12). Ensure cards cycle through pastel colors and have interactive hover states (shift X/Y and increase shadow).
Build the State Boards 'Coming Soon' section. It should look 'locked' with 8 dashed-border cards and a prominent floating 'Notify Me' button.
Build the 6 Features grid and 'Why Ceibaa' section using the provided image URLs.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, form inputs, and major sections.
Do NOT use raw HTML `<select>`, `<input type='date'>`, etc. If needed, use shadcn components but heavily customize them to fit the Neo-Brutalist look (thick borders, offset shadows).
Never use placeholder image URLs. Only use the ones provided in the media object.
